headline: The SoFi CEO Just Bought 70,000 Shares With His Own Money. Here Are Four More Under $30 Worth a Closer Look
summary: With markets at elevated multiples in May 2026, low share prices can mislead investors into thinking quality is out of reach. Stocks trading below $30 with strong balance sheets offer income, deleveraging stories, or growth at valuations that build in a margin of safety. Here are five stocks trading under $30 that pair solid books ... The SoFi CEO Just Bought 70,000 Shares With His Own Money. Here Are Four More Under $30 Worth a Closer Look

headline: KeyCorp’s New US$3 Billion Buyback and Dividends Might Change The Case For Investing In KEY
summary: In mid-May 2026, KeyCorp announced a new US$3.00 billion common share repurchase authorization, completed a prior US$720.00 million buyback, and confirmed second-quarter common and preferred dividends payable on June 15, 2026. Together with an employee stock offering shelf registration and ongoing regional business expansion, these capital actions highlight how KeyCorp is balancing shareholder returns with growth and workforce investment. We’ll now examine how KeyCorp’s newly authorized...
